message:
style: apply rustfmt to codec, cass, cx, ipc, main, and mux domain

Pure cargo fmt output across six files. Zero behavioral change — all hunks
are whitespace, line-break, import ordering, or macro-invocation reflow
that rustfmt enforces. Committed in one pass to avoid a second run
producing a multi-file diff against freshly-landed code in the preceding
commits in this session.

## Per-file changes

frankenterm/codec/src/lib.rs
  - Reorder anyhow imports into alphabetical order:
    use anyhow::{Context as _, Error, bail} -> use anyhow::{bail, Context as _, Error}
  - De-dedent the two match blocks inside decode_raw / decode_raw_async
    (left over with one extra level of indentation from the previous
    edit that added checked_add for header_len).
  - Collapse five `assert!(\n    Pdu::Variant(...)\n    .is_user_input()\n);`
    blocks into `assert!(Pdu::Variant(...).is_user_input());` reflow in the
    test module (WriteToPane, SendPaste, Resize, SetPaneZoomed).

crates/frankenterm-core/src/cass.rs
  - Collapse a two-line method call on `self` into a single line in
    CassClient's query_view_current. `self\n    .query_with_cx(...)` ->
    `self.query_with_cx(...)`.

crates/frankenterm-core/src/cx.rs
  - Collapse the `{ crate::runtime_compat::timeout_with_cx(...) }` block
    expression onto one line — rustfmt considers the single-statement
    block a reflow target. Empty trailing line inside the surrounding
    function removed.

crates/frankenterm-core/src/ipc.rs
  - Strip a trailing empty line at end of run_with_auth block.
  - Reflow 3 ipc_constant_time_eq test call sites into multi-line struct
    literal form for the vec![] of IpcAuthToken { token, scopes, expires_at_ms }.
  - Reflow 1 assert!(auth.authorize(...).is_err()) call that was exceeding
    line width into explicit multi-line form.

crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs
  - Restart-post-preflight test reflows: join previously multi-line
    `let stop_called = Arc::new(AtomicBool::new(false))` declarations onto
    single lines, collapse multi-line `restore_called.store(...)` onto one,
    and reflow three abort-outcome `expect_err(&format!(...))` panics from
    two-line into one-line-args form.

frankenterm/mux/src/domain.rs
  - Collapse a std::pin::pin!(...) with multi-line args into single-form
    where the inner call fits. Reflow spawn_pane.await chain in the final
    assert.

Runs clean under cargo fmt --check after this commit.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
